name: Devil's Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 T Cooking Oil Or As Needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into small pieces.
2. Trim all fat and membranes from the pieces.
3. Pound each piece until 1/4-inch or less.
4. Mix mustard and spices in a bowl.
5. Dredge the meat on both sides in the mixture.
6. Heat a large frying pan with oil over medium heat.
7. Fry a few pieces at a time, 1 to 1/2 minutes on each side, until golden brown. Keep warm.
8. Drain mushrooms and set aside.
9. Add mushroom liquid and Worcestershire sauce to the pan.
10. Simmer and scrape off pan drippings.
11. Add mushrooms and wine to the liquid, heat briefly.
12. If desired, thicken the liquid with flour or cornstarch.
13. Serve over meat.
